name: decision-grade-pivot
query: I'm thinking of moving a client portal off GitHub Pages to Cloudflare Pages — is that the right move, or should I stay?
expected_behavior: Classifies as decision-grade (stack change, expensive to undo) — not a quick lookup
Checks the research index first, anchors the date, then verifies current Cloudflare Pages / GitHub Pages capabilities via research MCPs
Returns the Decision Brief format: weighted criteria table (fit, solo maintenance, lock-in/resale, switching cost, maturity, cost), reversibility call, cost-of-change vs cost-of-staying
Scores against standing constraints (resale-readiness, solo maintenance, existing Cloudflare usage in the stack)
Ends with 'what would change this call' and asks before any production-impacting migration is executed
